title: Model/Actriz Share Surprise New Swan Songs EP
author: Abby Jones
summary:
Model/Actriz released their great sophomore album Pirouette just over a year ago, and today the glowering art-punks are keeping the party going with Swan Songs, a new surprise-released EP. “Glassman” is a mash of industrial-inspired beats about spending a weekend with a crush; “Thank You By Dido” is an eerie ballad and not a cover…

The post Model/Actriz Share Surprise New <em>Swan Songs</em> EP appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Model/Actriz released their great sophomore album Pirouette just over a year ago, and today the glowering art-punks are keeping the party going with Swan Songs, a new surprise-released EP. "Glassman" is a mash of industrial-inspired beats about spending a weekend with a crush; "Thank You By Dido" is an eerie ballad and not a cover of "Thank You" by Dido; "Majesty" is a hypnotic, mellower reflection about accomplishing your dreams despite feeling alienated. I really hope the EP's title doesn't predicate Model/Actriz's inclusion on our 2026 In Memoriam list, but only time will tell. Listen to Swan Songs below.

Swan Songs EP is out now via True Panther.
